name: APPLIED GENETIC TE.DL-001
summary: Applied Genetic Technologies Corporation (AGTC) is a clinical-stage biotechnology company focused on developing genetic therapies for inherited retinal diseases. AGTC uses its gene therapy platform to design and construct novel recombinant adeno-associated virus (AAV) vectors and develop gene therapies to potentially improve patients' vision. The company is headquartered in Alachua, Florida.
